/public/software/compiler/dtk-26.04/hip/bin/hipcc -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libftccl_midware.so -o libftccl_midware.so CMakeFiles/ftccl_midware.dir/src/ftccl_midware.cpp.o   -L/public/home/scnethpc26107/sdr/ftccl/custom-rccl-dtk-26.04/build  -L/public/home/scnethpc26107/sdr/ftccl/custom-rccl-dtk-26.04/build/lib  -L/public/home/scnethpc26107/sdr/ftccl/custom-rccl-dtk-26.04/build/lib64  -L/public/software/compiler/dtk-26.04/hip/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/public/home/scnethpc26107/sdr/ftccl/custom-rccl-dtk-26.04/build:/public/home/scnethpc26107/sdr/ftccl/custom-rccl-dtk-26.04/build/lib:/public/home/scnethpc26107/sdr/ftccl/custom-rccl-dtk-26.04/build/lib64:/public/software/compiler/dtk-26.04/hip/lib:/public/software/compiler/dtk-26.04/hip/lib64 /public/home/scnethpc26107/sdr/ftccl/custom-rccl-dtk-26.04/build/librccl.so /public/software/compiler/dtk-26.04/hip/lib/libamdhip64.so -ldl -lpthread
